short_blurb: Quality roofing services for Monrovia homes and foothills properties.
local_note: Monrovia's historic Old Town and foothill neighborhoods have distinctive home styles that call for careful material selection. The foothills above Monrovia Canyon Park are in fire hazard zones requiring Class A assemblies. We're experienced with both the character-home work in the flats and the fire-zone compliance requirements in the upper neighborhoods, delivering roofs that look right and meet code.

faqs.q: Can you match the look of my historic Monrovia Craftsman while meeting fire code?
faqs.a: Yes. We can install Class A-rated composition shingles or concrete tile that replicates the profile of your existing roof while meeting VHFHSZ requirements. We'll show you samples before any work begins.
